title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Luffy, Zoro, Unknown person #12, Stussy as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's got three seraphims with him... this is looking tough!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey S-Bear, go ahead and destroy one of them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's impo- visible, Kaku! We're at a disadvan- tape here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, S-Bear! Get rid of those govern-ment officials there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Beep beep

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh, crap!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's right, our "authority chip"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is no match to the one he has!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: GYAA AAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: UWAA AAAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, the "Rank of Authority" they follow is different than those of the Pacifistas!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if the five elders orders them through the trans- ponder snails...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The PacificFista's rank of authority

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 1) Five Elders 2 Dr. vegapunk Stella + Satellite)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...It will be invalid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: 4) Holder of the authority chip

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Anyone seems

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, now that I think about it, it would be a loss of an asset for the government if we destroy a separation!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it, Lucci! Why aren't ya thinking this through?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Mogura pistol!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Someone knows I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well then, let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: S-snake! You will guide the straw hat pirates to the frontier dome using the vacuum rocket!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: S-HAWK AND S-SHARK...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You will hold off CPO here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Chopper, are my eyes deceiving me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you noticed it too? I also thought he looked just like you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: These brown- skinned fellows look similar...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... to the former members of the seven warlords!

dialogue.speaker: Stussy
dialogue.text: I never thought they would clone us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey! Ake guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's been a while!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw Hat! Don't casually call me by my weapon's name!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't forget that we're enemies!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you'll let old man punk escape with you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yeah, he re- Quested it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's fine!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know if I can rely on you about that, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who would've thought you'd become an Emperor! I can't quite understand that form of yours...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
